title: AutonomyProfile
description: Autonomy control surface for a CapabilityDescriptor (v0.3.4). Declares tier, budget gates, and rollback intent.

tier.description: Invocation mode constraint. 'approval_required' gates every invocation until an external approval_granted event is recorded.

spend_limit.description: Maximum cumulative spend (spend_units × invocations) per correlation_id. null = unlimited.

spend_units.description: Cost per invocation. Multiplied by execution_started count to compute total spend.

action_limit.description: Maximum execution_started events per correlation_id. null = unlimited.

rollback_policy.description: Governance intent for rollback strategy. Declared in evidence but not mechanically enforced in v0.3.4.
